title: Skip class field linking if any of its super classes is a param
body: Currently, linking of class fields is skipped in the first pass of V3LinkDot if a class extends (directly) its parameter. It is done in this way, because at the first pass of V3LinkDot parameters aren't resolved yet, so references to fields of the base class can't be linked. In this PR I made this behavior more general. Linking of class fields is skipped if any super class extends its parameter.
